description: Reaction-based interactive prompts scoped to one conversation

interactive.py.scoping_mechanism: Questions tracked by event_id in _active_questions dict, scoped by (room_id, thread_id, creator_agent)
key_checks: Only the agent that created the question processes reactions
Reactions from agents are ignored (sender check)
Reactions to unknown questions return None
Text responses checked per room/thread/question combo with exact digit matching

config_confirmation.py.scoping_mechanism: Pending changes tracked by event_id, only requester can confirm/cancel
key_checks: Only ROUTER agent processes config confirmations
Stored in Matrix room state for persistence

behavioral_verification.from_CMD-005: Config confirmation posted with reaction buttons (checkmark/X), scoped to specific event_id and requester @test_user_s7c:localhost
behavioral_verification.from_CMD-006: Pending change restored after restart, maintaining requester identity and event scope
